certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Standard supply chain process with no identified high-risk characteristics

gaps: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI-driven design chain strategy development
Insufficient documentation on AI agent's decision-making process and algorithms used
No clear metrics or KPIs defined for evaluating design chain strategy effectiveness
No evidence of human oversight and review process for AI-driven design chain strategy outputs
recommendations: Implement a risk management process that includes identification, assessment, and mitigation of risks associated with AI-driven design chain strategy development
Develop and maintain documentation on AI agent's decision-making process, algorithms used, and data sources
Establish clear metrics and KPIs to evaluate design chain strategy effectiveness and monitor AI agent's performance
Establish a human oversight and review process for AI-driven design chain strategy outputs to ensure accuracy and validity

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: minimal. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI-driven design chain strategy development
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
